panels.description: Queries per second for shard services.

targets.expr: (sum by (service_name) (irate(mongodb_op_counters_total{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", type!="command"}[$__rate_interval]))) * on (service_name) group_right avg by (service_name, set) (mongodb_mongod_replset_my_state{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", set=~"$shard"} / mongodb_mongod_replset_my_state{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", set=~"$shard"})

panels.title: Shard services QPS - $shard

panels.description: Queries per second for config services.

targets.expr: (sum by (service_name) (irate(mongodb_op_counters_total{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", type!="command"}[$__rate_interval]))) * on (service_name) group_right avg by (service_name, set) (mongodb_mongod_replset_my_state{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", set!~"$shard"} / mongodb_mongod_replset_my_state{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", set!~"$shard"})

panels.title: Config services QPS

panels.description: Queries per second for mongos services.

targets.expr: (sum by (service_name) (rate(mongodb_op_counters_total{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", type!="command"}[$__rate_interval]))) * on (service_name) group_right avg by (service_name) (avg by (service_name) (mongodb_mongos_db_collections_total{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster"}) / avg by (service_name) (mongodb_mongos_db_collections_total{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster"}))

panels.description: Current connections aggregated per shard.

targets.expr: sum by (set) (avg by (service_name, set) (mongodb_connections{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", state="current"}) * on (service_name) group_right avg by (service_name, set) (mongodb_mongod_replset_my_state{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster"} / mongodb_mongod_replset_my_state{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster"}))

panels.title: Current connections per shard

panels.description: Operations per second aggregated by shard.
panels.title: Operations per shard

panels.description: Operations per second by type.
panels.title: Operations by type

panels.description: Operations per second for selected instance.
panels.title: Operations $service_name

panels.description: Total cursors aggregated by shard.

targets.expr: sum(sum(mongodb_mongod_metrics_cursor_open{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", state="total"} or mongodb_mongod_cursors{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", state="total_open"}) by (service_name) * on (service_name) group_right mongodb_mongod_replset_my_state{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster"} / mongodb_mongod_replset_my_state{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster"}) by (set)

panels.title: Cursors per shard

panels.description: Total number of open cursors across the cluster.

targets.expr: sum by () (max_over_time(mongodb_mongod_metrics_cursor_open{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", state="total"}[$__rate_interval]) or max_over_time(mongodb_mongos_metrics_cursor_open{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", state="total"}[$__rate_interval]) or max_over_time(mongodb_mongod_cursors{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", state="total_open"}[$__rate_interval]) or max_over_time(mongodb_mongos_cursors{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", state="total_open"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: MongoDB cursors

panels.description: Cursors per instance.

targets.expr: sum by (service_name) (max_over_time(mongodb_mongod_metrics_cursor_open{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", state="total"}[$__rate_interval]) or max_over_time(mongodb_mongos_metrics_cursor_open{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", state="total"}[$__rate_interval]) or max_over_time(mongodb_mongod_cursors{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", state="total_open"}[$__rate_interval]) or max_over_time(mongodb_mongos_cursors{job=~"$job",mongodb_cluster=~"$mongodb_cluster", state="total_open"}[$__rate_interval]))
